videos.headline: Arkansas avoids the upset with late 4th down TD
videos.description: Down six on fourth down, Arkansas quarterback Austin Allen has to back-pedal to buy some time before finding Jeremy Sprinkle in the end zone for what would prove to be the game-winning touchdown against Louisiana Tech.
